mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_PL_DO_AUDIT_REQUEST(
RECEIVE_ADDRESS_NAME , RECEIVE_ADDRESS_CODE , SEND_ADDRESS_NAME , SEND_ADDRESS_CODE , FORM_TITLE , REQUEST_DATE --, 본문 컬럼 뭐로?.. , FORM_ID , FORM_VERSION , KEEP_FORM_ID , FSRGDTM , FSRGID , LSCHGDTM , LSCHGID ) VALUES ( #{수신부서} , #{수신코드} , #{발신부서} , #{발신코드} , #{건 명} , SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT FORM_ID , FORM_VERSION , DISTRIBUTE_ORDER , ROLE_CODE , ROLE_NAME , SIGN_TYPE , DISTRIBUTE_NOTE
FROM TB_PL_RE_STANDARD_APPROVAL ORDER BY DISTRIBUTE_ORDER ASC

select AUREQ.FORM_ID , AUREQ.FORM_TITLE , AUREQ.FSRGID , STAPP.FSRGDTM , APREQ.APPROVAL_NAME , APREQ.APPROVAL_NAME , APREQ.STATE_CONTENTS
FROM TB_PL_RE_APPROVAL_REQUEST APREQ , TB_PL_RE_STANDARD_APPROVAL STAPP , TB_PL_DO_AUDIT_REQUEST AUREQ
WHERE APREQ.FORM_ID = STAPP.FORM_ID and STAPP.FORM_ID = AUREQ.FORM_ID and APREQ.FORM_VERSION = STAPP.FORM_VERSION and STAPP.FORM_VERSION = AUREQ.FORM_VERSION
